summary: Test coverage for sound latent sequence parallelism is missing: StubCosmos3Transformer lacks the new method, and existing tests bypass the new pad-for-SP branch via a lambda; extend the stub and add a test variant that exercises sp_video_shape.
Add docstring to the new method sound_latent_frames_for_sequence_parallel.
Add docstring to _prepare_sound_latents documenting the new sp_video_shape and sp_num_vision_items parameters.
Broaden inline comment to mention that transfer+sound is also rejected alongside action+sound.
Remove dead condition 'sound_frames <= 0' as the sole call site always passes >=1; replace with an assert if desired.
